sql: WITH t AS ( SELECT ct.net_sol, ct.entry_ts, ct.entry_drift_pct drift, ct.exit_reason, ct.entry_ts - COALESCE(g.migration_timestamp, g.timestamp) age_sec FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.id = (SELECT MAX(g2.id) FROM graduations g2 WHERE g2.mint = ct.mint) WHERE ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL AND ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-strict' ), b AS (SELECT (MIN(entry_ts)+MAX(entry_ts))/2 mid FROM t), f AS (SELECT t.*, CASE WHEN entry_ts < (SELECT mid FROM b) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END half FROM t WHERE drift <= 0), r AS (SELECT half, CASE WHEN age_sec<900 THEN 'a_lt15m' WHEN age_sec<1800 THEN 'b_15-30m' WHEN age_sec<3600 THEN 'c_30-60m' WHEN age_sec<14400 THEN 'd_1-4h' ELSE 'e_gt4h' END bkt, net_sol, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY half, CASE WHEN age_sec<900 THEN 'a_lt15m' WHEN age_sec<1800 THEN 'b_15-30m' WHEN age_sec<3600 THEN 'c_30-60m' WHEN age_sec<14400 THEN 'd_1-4h' ELSE 'e_gt4h' END ORDER BY net_sol DESC) rk FROM f) SELECT bkt, half, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),2) net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4) avg_net, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN rk>3 THEN net_sol ELSE 0 END),2) xt3 FROM r GROUP BY bkt, half ORDER BY bkt, half
